---
title: "About"
image: otter.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: globe
      text: Website
      href: https://shyam-r.quarto.pub/shyam/

---

This blog is a place for me to share (mathematical) things that have caught my interest, be they random musings or topics that I am actively learning about. My hope is that anyone who reads these posts will be able to learn something about the mathematics from my perspective.
